landing.tagline: The operating system for strategic leadership
landing.headline:
Test.
Scale.
Win.
landing.desc: 90-day strategic sprints for leadership teams who make decisions with conviction.
landing.step3: Scale what works. Kill what doesn't.

sprints.noSprintsDesc: A sprint defines your strategic focus for a cycle. Create your first sprint to start tracking bets and progress.

form.focusPlaceholder: What matters most this cycle? List up to 3 priorities.
form.signalsPlaceholder: e.g. Increased AI adoption, Stronger pipeline
form.betSubtitle: A testable hypothesis — not a project.
form.whyNowPlaceholder: Why is this the right moment?
form.hypothesisFormatDesc: If we do X, we believe Y will happen, measured by Z.
form.hypothesisPlaceholder: If we embed AI copilots in 3 squads, we believe cycle time will drop 20%, measured by sprint velocity.
form.killCriteriaPlaceholder: AI usage rate below 30% after 6 weeks.
form.scaleTriggerPlaceholder: Cycle time reduction ≥20% across all 3 squads.
form.signalSubtitle: Lightweight checkpoint. Not a decision meeting.
form.notePlaceholder: What changed or caught your attention?
form.whatHappenedPlaceholder: e.g. AI usage at 52% in squads A and B
form.insight: Insight — what does this tell us?
form.scaleDesc: Confirmed. Generates a draft for next sprint.
form.pivotDesc: New direction. Generates a draft with updated hypothesis.
form.updatedHypothesisPlaceholder: New direction for the next sprint...
form.keyLearningPlaceholder: What did this bet teach us?
form.scaleDesc2: Generates a draft bet for expansion into the next sprint.
form.pivotDesc2: Generates a draft with updated hypothesis for the next sprint.
form.areaNamePlaceholder: e.g. Marketing Team, BU América, Centro Regional LATAM
form.subAreasUnavailable: Sub-areas not available on trial plan
form.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
form.coachSyntacticHint: Surface-level clarity checks on text fields.
form.coachSemanticHint: Deeper coaching on meaning and alignment.

sidebar.sprintDesc: Set the strategic direction for the next cycle. A Sprint defines where we focus — not what we execute.
sidebar.focusRuleDesc: 3 clear priorities maximum. If everything is a focus, nothing is.
sidebar.signalsRuleDesc: How will you recognize progress? Keep these directional, not metric-precise.
sidebar.rule1: The Sprint is fixed in time.
sidebar.rule2: The portfolio is flexible within the Sprint.
sidebar.rule3: Focus is intentionally limited by design.
sidebar.betDesc: A Bet is a testable hypothesis — not a project. If it cannot produce evidence within the sprint, it is not a bet.
sidebar.hypothesisRuleDesc: Define upfront when you will stop. This removes politics from the decision later.
sidebar.scaleRuleDesc: Define the signal that confirms you should double down.
sidebar.enablerRuleDesc: Mark a bet as Enabler when it builds capability rather than testing a market hypothesis. Tech debt, infrastructure, talent — these don't need a parent bet.
sidebar.portfolioRule2: Balance across revenue, margin, and capability.
sidebar.portfolioRule3: Each bet must have a clear owner area.
sidebar.signalDesc: A lightweight awareness checkpoint — not a decision meeting. No status changes. Just signal strength.
sidebar.strongDesc: Evidence is accumulating. Hypothesis looks valid.
sidebar.unclearDesc: Mixed signals. Not enough data to decide.
sidebar.weakDesc: Hypothesis is not holding. Consider killing.
sidebar.signalCadenceDesc: Signal Checks happen at the midpoint between Strategic Reviews — roughly twice per review interval. Keep it short: signal + one observation.
sidebar.reviewDesc: Not a status update — a structured decision moment. What happened, what does it tell us, and what do we do next?
sidebar.keepActiveRuleDesc: Not enough signal yet. Continue testing.
sidebar.scaleRuleDesc2: Hypothesis confirmed. Generates a draft bet for the next sprint.
sidebar.pivotRuleDesc: Direction changes. Generates a draft with updated hypothesis.
sidebar.killRuleDesc: No signal after sufficient time. Stop now, free the capacity.
sidebar.reviewCadenceDesc: 3× per sprint. Signal Checks happen at the midpoint — they update signal strength but do not change bet status.
sidebar.closureDesc: Closure is not reporting — it is reconfiguration. Decide what to carry forward, what to stop, and what the next cycle needs.
sidebar.closureCapabilityDesc: For each function, define what needs to change to support the next sprint. These are structural actions, not tasks.

form.betTypeDefault: Tests a market or strategic hypothesis
form.betLevelNote: This is a L{level} bet — it can be referenced by lower levels.
form.hypothesisPlaceholderShort: If we do X, we believe Y will happen, measured by Z
form.trialBetLimit: Your trial plan allows a maximum of 5 active bets. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
form.betLevelNoteShort: L{level} bet — referenceable by lower levels.
